add_params.name: ContactTemplateID
add_params.description: GUID of the template to update. PS1 uses this as the RowKey filter.

add_params.name: displayName
add_params.description: Template display name; also used as 'name' key internally.

add_params.name: country
add_params.description: 2-letter ISO code (unwrapped from autocomplete object by formatter)

notes: customDataformatter outputs ContactTemplateID (from router query id) plus the same contact fields as AddContactTemplates. The PS1 reads $Request.body.ContactTemplateID as required field, then iterates over propertiesToKeep list (displayName, firstName, lastName, email, hidefromGAL, streetAddress, postalCode, city, state, country, companyName, mobilePhone, businessPhone, jobTitle, website, mailTip) directly from $Request.body. No PascalCase renaming here — these field names are stored as-is in the template.
